title: orobot embodiment contract
description: Control-side contract for a robot embodiment exported by orobot Parts Builder. Companion to URDF/MJCF. v0.1-experimental — fields and names may change without semver guarantees until v1.0.

embodiment_id.description: Globally unique stable slug for this embodiment. Convention: <namespace>.<owner>.<robot>-<version>.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema the document targets. Use exact string match.

frame_convention.description: Coordinate frame convention. REP-103 = x-forward, z-up, right-handed.

dof.description: Total degrees of freedom. Must equal len(joint_names).

joint_names.description: Ordered list of joint names. MUST match the joint order the IK / policy will use. Names should match URDF <joint name="..."> attributes when possible.

action_space.description: Shape of the action vector the policy will emit per control step.

type.description: Action-space class. ee_delta_pose / ee_absolute_pose use 6-DoF cartesian (xyz + rpy) plus optional gripper as the trailing dim.

oneOf.description: Single unit applied to all dims.
Per-dim units; length must equal dim.

bounds.description: Per-dim [min, max] action limits. Length must equal dim.

state_space.description: Shape of the proprioception vector(s) the policy will observe per step.

control_hz.description: Nominal control / command rate in Hz.

cameras.description: Optional list of cameras mounted on the embodiment. Each camera is keyed to a URDF link name.

link.description: URDF link name this camera is rigidly attached to.

gripper.description: Optional. Describes the gripper / end-effector convention if the robot has one. Every shipping VLA treats gripper as a special channel.

compatible_policies.description: Tags for policy backends this embodiment is intended to be compatible with. Drives README fine-tune command templating.
